Home › Indian River County › Vero Beach › Gluten-Free Restaurants

Gluten-Free Restaurants in Vero Beach

The cleanest of Vero Beach's restaurants with gluten-free options is OCEAN GRILL, a perfect 100/100 at its last inspection. Here are all 6, each graded A–F so you can compare the kitchen, not just the menu.

6 gluten-free restaurants

  • A 100 O
    OCEAN GRILL Seafood ★ 4.5 (3545) Vero Bch · Indian River County VegGF +5 more Inspected May 2026
  • A 99 C
    CHIPOTLE MEXICAN GRILL 1859 Mexican ★ 3.7 (1426) Vero Beach · Indian River County VeganVeg +6 more Inspected Apr 2026
  • A 96 B
    BONEFISH GRILL American ★ 4.2 (1567) Vero Beach · Indian River County GFDF +6 more Inspected Jun 2026
  • A 92 S
    SPIRO'S TAVERNA Mediterranean ★ 4.7 (2437) Vero Beach · Indian River County VegGF +4 more Inspected Jan 2026
  • B 88 C
    CARRABBA'S ITALIAN GRILL Italian ★ 4.3 (1926) Vero Beach · Indian River County VegGF +1 more Inspected Jan 2026
  • B 82 O
    OUTBACK STEAKHOUSE American ★ 4.3 (4836) Vero Beach · Indian River County GFDF +4 more Inspected Feb 2026
